station_address: Bus Depot, Jogeshwari - Vikhroli Link Rd, opposite Majas, Jogeshwari East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400060
text: Quite a larger petrol wirh petrol, CNG gad filling facilities. Also puncture, puc and Tyre pressure checking and filling service. Also has, small groceries store. Convenient location on the J V link main road Andheri East,  next to kalpataure society. Quick and efficient services.

station_address: Bus Depot, Jogeshwari - Vikhroli Link Rd, opposite Majas, Jogeshwari East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400060
text:
The Female staff in the morning scams people.
I had gone to fill petrol in my bike and I asked her to fill 500rs (paanch-shay) petrol (I even showed 🖐🏻5 fingers as 500 to her), but she intentionally filled the tank with 530rs . I confronted her about it so she says " tu 530 bollas (paanch-shya-tees)" .

The attitude and behaviour of the female staff is very rude with everyone , I avoid filling petrol there if these women are there .

They waste everyone's times , leave to drink water/chai while people are waiting at the pump for them to finish with their drinks break .

When asked someone else to fill the petrol while one is gone to drink water they say that she will come back in 5min and fill petrol .

They don't even care about your time , if you are in a hurry or have to go to some place urgently, they are in their own day dreaming more .

Also They speak on call while filling petrol which is also very dangerous, continuously theyre talking to someone while next to the pump.

I don't recommend filling petrol here in the morning. Just fill petrol near Kamal amrohi studio or shell petrol pump near powai.

The Male staff in the night is very Respectful and responsible. Very good Service.

But not the female staff of the morning is not at all respectful also will try to scam you and you cannot do anything bcoz they will play victim card or blame you and might even put false allegations on you.

station_address: Bus Depot, Jogeshwari - Vikhroli Link Rd, opposite Majas, Jogeshwari East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400060
text:
Large brand backing = reliability in fuel supply (no major reports of “out of fuel” for such central stations).

Modern amenities: e.g., the BKC outlet has EV charging, and good ancillary services (air pump, tyre check) in some reviews.

Professional look and location make it suitable for regular commuters, business travellers and users who want more than just “grab & go”.

station_address: Bus Depot, Jogeshwari - Vikhroli Link Rd, opposite Majas, Jogeshwari East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400060
text: Absolutely scammers of all. Filled in 2000rs petrol.  He first filled for 700 only saying “Pump meter thoda sa kharab hai” went on to fill 1300 more. After all, we checked the fuel gauge and to my surprise not even 1ltr was filled. After just taking a u-turn and coming back to address it, they blamed us for malice.

station_address: Bus Depot, Jogeshwari - Vikhroli Link Rd, opposite Majas, Jogeshwari East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400060
text:
Warning: Possible Tire Puncture Scam at This Petrol Pump

I had a very bad experience at this petrol pump. I stopped just to fill fuel, and the staff suddenly pointed out that my tire had a puncture. They insisted on repairing it immediately. I didn't notice any problem before arriving, and later I strongly suspected that they may have actually caused the puncture themselves just to make money.

This kind of dishonest behavior is unacceptable and feels like a scam. I want to warn others to be very careful — don’t let them touch your tires unless you’re absolutely sure there’s a problem.

Extremely disappointed and won’t be visiting this place again.

station_address: Bus Depot, Jogeshwari - Vikhroli Link Rd, opposite Majas, Jogeshwari East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400060
text:
Beware of Potential Scam at This Petrol Pump

We recently visited this petrol pump to refuel our car. As we were exiting, a person informed us that one of our tires was completely flat, possibly punctured. Upon checking, we confirmed the issue and approached the air station at the pump to get it fixed. While they did repair the tire, we noticed that another car experienced the exact same problem at the same time.

This seems highly suspicious and raises concerns about a potential scam being carried out at this location, possibly causing deliberate tire punctures to charge for repairs.

We strongly advise others to avoid this petrol pump. It appears they may be engaging in fraudulent activities.
